+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "missionClass": "solution",

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vault: Identity Backend Audit HMAC Request/Response Cannot Be Configured",
+    "description": "Identity Backend Audit HMAC Request/Response Cannot Be Configured. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vault setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vault version and configuration:\n```bash\nvault version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vault installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vault configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\nIt does not appear possible to allowlist fields to be printed in cleartext in the audit logs for requests/responses from the Identity backend."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Identity Backend Audit HMAC Request/Response Cannot Be…",
+        "description": "I didn't expect this to be so simple, but it seems like removing `identity` from the \"non tunable\" mounts list just works, at least for the audit hmac tuning I've tested.\n\nThere may be other impacts I'm not aware of due to this, if y'all can think of any you want me to test for specifically please\n```yaml\n> vault secrets tune -audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids -audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids identity\nError tuning secrets engine identity/: Error making API request.\n\nURL: POST http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/mounts/identity/tune\nCode: 400. Errors:\n\n* cannot tune \"identity/\"\n\n> vault write sys/mounts/identity/tune audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids\nError writing data to sys/mounts/identity/tune: Error making API request.\n\nURL: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/mounts/identity/tune\nCode: 400. Errors:\n\n* cannot tune \"identity/\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Identity Backend Audit HMAC Request/Response Cannot Be…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I didn't expect this to be so simple, but it seems like removing `identity` from the \"non tunable\" mounts list just works, at least for the audit hmac tuning I've tested.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "> vault secrets tune -audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids -audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids identity\nError tuning secrets engine identity/: Error making API request.\n\nURL: POST http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/mounts/identity/tune\nCode: 400. Errors:\n\n* cannot tune \"identity/\"\n\n> vault write sys/mounts/identity/tune audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids\nError writing data to sys/mounts/identity/tune: Error making API request.\n\nURL: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/mounts/identity/tune\nCode: 400. Errors:\n\n* cannot tune \"identity/\"",
+        "2022-03-24T11:25:17.201-0400 [ERROR] secrets.system.system_fafb1c8d: cannot tune this mount: path=identity/",
+        "> bin/vault server -dev -dev-root-token-id=test"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
